sp_widget.name: tracenow_browse_tables
sp_widget.template:

Browse Records

Select tables from {{c.data.instanceName}}

Back to all tables

From table {{c.selectedTable.label}}
Filters
{{f.logic}}
{{col.label}}
PREVIEW

Migration in Progress

Migrating your records with intelligent dependency handling

Records Processed

Progress
{{c.progress}}%
Please do not close this window during migration
×
✖ ✓

{{ c.migrationResult.error ? 'Migration Failed' : 'Migration Completed Successfully!' }}

{{c.migrationResult.message || 'Something went wrong during migration'}} All {{c.total}} records have been migrated successfully
